name: nestjs-react-monorepo
description: NestJS 11 API + React 18 + Vite, npm workspaces monorepo

variables.TEST_CI_CMD: npm run test:run --workspace=apps/web && npm run test --workspace=apps/api
variables.SCOPES: api, web, worker, shared, ui, prisma, infra, ci

PACKAGE_SCRIPTS.test:ci: npm run test:run --workspace=apps/web && npm run test --workspace=apps/api
